svg.title: Agama liquidation worked example
svg.desc: Three-phase liquidation flow: trigger at T0, finalize at T+72h, settle at T+15 days.
svg.text: Alice deposited 1M AMFI at $1.00, borrowed 700k USDr (70% LTV).
Senior tranche marks down to $0.80. HF = (1M × 0.80 × 80%) / 700k = 0.914.
72h grace period — Alice may repay to cure

g.text: Pure lender (Bob, no SP) — agTOKEN whole, unaffected
Staked Bob — agaSP value down 700k, holds claim on AMFI in custody
Pure lender (Bob, no SP) — unaffected throughout
Staked Bob — agaSP back to peg, share of 57k bonus pro-rata
Protocol — 20k AMFI Treasury + 30k AMFI + 57k USDr Reserve Fund, solvent
